chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.42 of 2023 Syed Amar Khan and another Versus Sahibzada Khan and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.733/2023 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 17.11.2023 None present for the Appellants. Mr. Muhammad Nadeem Khan, Advocate for respondents No.3 to 6. Respondent No.2 Syed Ali Shah present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. None present for the appellants. The appellants have filed this appeal in respect of an order dated 22.11.2022 wherein several applications were fixed for hearing. Appellants seem to be aggrieved of an order passed on applications at serial No.3 and 11 which applications were dismissed for non-prosecution, as counsels were not present. Subsequently application for restoration was moved as CMA No.18369/2022 which was also dismissed as he (appellant’s counsel) was not ready to argue the matter in relation to the applications where order was passed for non-prosecution. On the last date counsel for appellants requested for time and today he is not in attendance and there is no intimation either. It seems that the appellants have lost their interest in the proceedings, as the order sheets show. The instant High Court Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
